key_themes: Exceptional earnings growth and margin expansion
Strong orders, renewables/grid tailwinds, and strategic catalysts
Elevated valuation with analyst targets below current price
sources_checked: Arteche investor website and press releases
summary: Arteche reported outstanding FY2025 results, with net profit surging 93.4% to €45.3 million, sales rising 15.3% to €508.4 million (first time over €500M), orders up 16% to €590.1 million, and significant margin improvement, beating elements of its 2024-2026 strategic plan.[[1]](https://www.arteche.com/en/news/arteche-achieves-net-profit-eu453-million-2025-934-2024)[[2]](https://www.arteche.com/en/investors-corner)[[2]](https://www.arteche.com/en/investors-corner) H1 2025 was record-setting with 168% net profit growth and book-to-bill >1x. Major positives include new renewable contracts (e.g. Australia REZ), acquisitions (RTR Energía, UPTECH stake), upgraded listing to Spain's main market in Feb 2026, and rising dividends amid electrification tailwinds.[[3]](https://www.arteche.com/en/news/arteche-strengthens-its-presence-australia-joining-central-west-orana-rez-project-acerez)[[4]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/ART.MC/) Biggest risk is rich valuation (PE ~35-47x, analyst avg target €24.83 vs ~€28 current price), which could pressure the stock if growth moderates despite consensus "Buy" ratings.[[5]](https://www.investing.com/equities/arteche-lantegi-elkartea-consensus-estimates)[[6]](https://www.marketscreener.com/quote/stock/ARTECHE-LANTEGI-ELKARTEA--123776304/consensus/)

recent_posts.highlight: Arteche closes 2025 with major growth, moves to main Bolsa listing, and benefits from heavy electrical network investments.
Clarification sought on EPS €0.79 and implied dividend payout post strong results release.
Limited relevant discussion; some unrelated tickers or older data; overall low volume of retail sentiment on platform.
